compiled_state.title: debug-everything does not run a build to see if the build process succeeds
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The /dso:debug-everything workflow validates tests and linting but does not run the build process. If a code change breaks compilation (e.g. a TypeScript error, a Python import error, or a broken package.json build script), debug-everything will mark validation as passed while the build fails silently. This means broken builds can slip through the fix pipeline without detection.

comments.body: Duplicate of 1f27-4295. Fix implemented in validate.sh (CMD_BUILD) and dso-config.conf. Closing as duplicate.
comments.author: Test
